ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

benefit.en: Subsidy of 15-35% on bank loans up to rupees 50 lakh (manufacturing) or 20 lakh (services) to set up new micro-enterprises in rural and urban areas. Margin money subsidy higher for SC/ST/OBC/women/disabled/ex-servicemen.
benefit.hi: नई सूक्ष्म इकाइयों के लिए 25 लाख तक के बैंक ऋण पर 15-35% सब्सिडी

eligibility_rules_human: Indian citizen aged 18 or above, minimum 8th-pass for projects above 10 lakh (manufacturing) / 5 lakh (services). Self-help groups, charitable trusts, and registered societies also eligible. Existing units not eligible.

application_paths.offline_office_pattern: KVIC / KVIB / DIC office in the district
offline_steps: Apply online on the KVIC portal
Application reviewed by district task force committee
Bank sanctions loan; KVIC releases margin money subsidy
